notes: FROZEN (daemon=incapable). Mistral Vibe 2.19.0 genuinely raises a plan-mode approval pause (exit_plan_mode tool blocks on user_input_callback), but that → waiting transition is never persisted to the messages.jsonl the daemon tails — vibe flushes per-turn (_save_messages at agent_loop.py:1076, only after the blocking _handle_tool_calls completes), so the open exit_plan_mode tool_call and its result land together post-approval. No recording can verify the scenario's load-bearing single → waiting observable, so no phases are asserted. Same architectural blocker as the gemini-cli plan-mode cell.
